---
title: Ambulance DES
subtitle: Discrete-event simulation work with South Western Ambulance Service NHS Foundation Trust (SWASFT).
image: pixelambulance.png
year: 2026
---

I have recently started on this work, from **April 2026** onwards.

<iframe
  class="auto-preview"
  width="100%"
  height="800"
  src="https://ambmodels.github.io/ambdes/"
  title="Ambulance DES">
</iframe>
